recommendations.title: The Princess Switch 3: Romancing the Star
recommendations.overview: A priceless relic is stolen from identical royals Queen Margaret and Princess Stacy, who enlist the help of their sketchy look-alike cousin Fiona Pembroke to retrieve it.

recommendations.title: The Princess Switch
recommendations.overview: When a down-to-earth Chicago baker and a soon-to-be princess discover they look like twins, they hatch a Christmastime plan to trade places.

recommendations.title: A Christmas Miracle for Daisy
recommendations.overview: Whitney Alder owns interior design firm Marietta Designs, which she runs with her friend Andi in the small town of Marietta, Montana. Whitney is designing Santa’s float for the annual Marietta Christmas Parade when a potential job opportunity comes h

recommendations.title: My Secret Santa
recommendations.overview: A single mom needs a job. A ski resort needs a Santa. Disguised as a St. Nick lookalike, can Taylor fool a charming hotel heir into ho-ho-hiring her?

recommendations.title: Dear Santa
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Romance, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Crystal, a rich party girl, finds a little girl's letter to Santa asking for a new mother, and she vows to win over the father and daughter before the holidays.

recommendations.title: It's the Great Pumpkin, Charlie Brown
recommendations.overview: Join the Peanuts gang for a timeless adventure as Charlie Brown preps for a party, Snoopy sets his sights on the Red Baron, and Linus patiently awaits a pumpkin patch miracle.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
recommendations.overview: A Californian family inherits a castle in Romania. This is especially exciting to the son, who is obsessed with monsters. And he is not disappointed.

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: Merry Christmas, Drake & Josh
recommendations.overview: Step brothers Drake and Josh must give a foster family the best Christmas ever or face years in jail for a Christmas party gone wrong.

recommendations.title: The Holiday Calendar
recommendations.overview: A talented photographer stuck in a dead-end job inherits an antique Advent calendar that may be predicting the future -- and pointing her toward love.
